title: athyrium × mantoniae
intro: Athyrium × mantoniae, also known as Mantonia's lady fern or the hybrid lady fern, is a rare and unique hybrid fern species that results from the cross-pollination of the Athyrium filix-femina and Athyrium angustum fern species. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Athyrium × mantoniae include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Athyrium × mantoniae can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried fronds in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant material in a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
